recapPrompt.prompt: What does the marker isWord mean in a trie?

choices.label: A whole word ends at this node
choices.feedback: Correct. isWord marks a complete stored word ending.

choices.label: This node has children below it
choices.feedback: Not this one. Children show next letters, but isWord marks a full word ending.

reflectionPrompt.prompt: Explain in your own words why tries are strong for autocomplete-style jobs.

practiceChallenge.title: Mastery check: rebuild the trie clues
practiceChallenge.description: Complete the helper so it returns the main clue for exact search, prefix search, and wildcard search.
hints: Exact search needs the path and the word ending marker.
Prefix search only needs the path.
Wildcard search tries all children when the dot appears.
practiceChallenge.successMessage: Pass. You rebuilt the main trie clues from memory.
practiceChallenge.retryMessage: Needs practice. Recheck exact search, prefix search, and wildcard branching.
